title: Arcana Package Graph
subtitle: Five packages, their dependencies, and current build state
purpose: Shows the v0.1.0 package layout and dependency direction. Useful for understanding what blocks what during the scaffold milestone.

packages.role: Base — Zod schemas, provider interfaces, Logger, QueryResult envelope, ARP scopes

v0_1_progress.T4_data_model_schemas: complete (22 tests at v0.1; grown via ADRs 004–007 to include ProfileEntry, MemoryStatus, isLatest/supersededBy on Memory + Fact, Contradiction.rationale)
v0_1_progress.T5_interfaces_envelopes: complete (15 additional tests at v0.1; StructuredStore grown via ADRs 002/005/006/007: +deleteEntity, +updateMemory, +markFactSuperseded, +markMemorySuperseded)

packages.role: Kernel — createArcana() factory + ingest/retrieve/maintain/access zones (stubbed in v0.1)

v0_1_progress.T7_skeleton_zones: complete (15 tests passing; zones throw NotImplementedError)
v0_1_progress.T8_createArcana_factory: complete (6 additional tests; total 86 across 19 files; .providers frozen; no-op scheduler/queue fallbacks)

packages.role: In-memory fake providers for consumer integration tests (compliance harness deferred)
Full StructuredStore implementation over libsql (same sync SQLite binding as KyberBot). All 9 entity types. In-memory integration tests. Unblocks KyberBot wiring initArcana().
